risk_title: Project Implementation Suspended Due to Political Instability
risk_summary: The Afghanistan Resilience Trust Fund (ARTF) component was canceled and IDA grant disbursements remain suspended due to the extraordinary political situation in Afghanistan, preventing effective project implementation.
evidence_quote: The Afghanistan Resilience Trust Fund (ARTF) in the project was canceled based on the consideration that the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan. Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until a decision is made by the World Bank.

risk_title: High Political and Governance Risk Rating
risk_summary: Political and Governance risk is rated as High, consistent since project approval, indicating fundamental governance fragility affecting project implementation capacity.
